case_title: AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING VS VALENZUELA AUGUSTINA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $135.00 FILED BY AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT VALENZUELA AUGUSTINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-08-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT VALENZUELA AUGUSTINA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VALENZUELA AUGUSTINA $135.00 PRINCIPAL, $41.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $176.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
